description:
You are acting as a release-manager who needs to prepare the next deployment
    bundle.  
    Inside your home directory there is already a folder
    “/home/user/release_pages/” containing three self-hosted HTML pages that
    represent the public release-note websites of our micro-services:

        /home/user/release_pages/alpha_release.html
        /home/user/release_pages/beta_release.html
        /home/user/release_pages/gamma_release.html

    Your goal is to scrape (in headless / non-interactive mode) the *latest*
    release number (the first <h2> tag that appears in the file) **and**
    its corresponding release date (the <p> tag that immediately follows
    that <h2>) from each of the three pages, and then write two output
    artefacts under “/home/user/deploy/”:

    1.  /home/user/deploy/release_summary.yaml  
        YAML structure and ordering must be *exactly*:

            services:
              - name: alpha
                latest_version: vX.Y.Z
                release_date: "YYYY-MM-DD"
              - name: beta
                latest_version: vX.Y.Z
                release_date: "YYYY-MM-DD"
              - name: gamma
                latest_version: vX.Y.Z
                release_date: "YYYY-MM-DD"

        • The list items **must appear in the fixed alpha → beta → gamma
          order** shown above.  
        • Every scalar value is case-sensitive.  
        • The date strings are wrapped in double quotes so that automated
          parsers keep them as strings.  

    2.  /home/user/deploy/extraction.log  
        A plain-text log file containing exactly three lines,
        one per service, in this strict colon-separated format:

            alpha:<version>:<date>
            beta:<version>:<date>
            gamma:<version>:<date>

        Example line (do not hard-code):  
            alpha:v2.3.1:2024-07-15

        • No leading / trailing whitespace.  
        • A final new-line (line-feed) must be present at the end of the file.  

    Constraints & Hints
    -------------------
    • Stay entirely in the terminal; do **not** attempt to open a graphical
      browser.  
    • Any text-based “headless browser” (e.g. `lynx -dump`, `w3m -dump`,
      `links -dump`) together with the usual text-processing utilities
      (grep, sed, awk, cut, etc.) is acceptable.  
    • You may assume the `lynx` package is available inside the container.  
    • Keep your solution to *no more than* 10 individual terminal commands.  
    • Make sure the “deploy” directory exists (create it if necessary)
      before writing the two files.  
    • Both output files must end up world-readable (at least 0644) so that
      the automated grader can inspect them.  

    Verification
    ------------
    Automated tests will:

      1. Read “/home/user/deploy/release_summary.yaml” and check that it
         matches the required YAML structure **byte-for-byte** except for the
         dynamic version and date fields.  
      2. Parse “/home/user/deploy/extraction.log” and validate that every
         service line contains the exact same version and date values that
         appear in the YAML file.  
      3. Ensure both files exist and have non-zero size.  

    When you are done, simply return to the prompt — no extra narrative
    output is required.
truth:
Initial files present before the agent begins: 1. /home/user/release_pages/alpha_release.html Content (14 lines, final newline present): ------------------------------------------------------------------------ Alpha Service Releases

Alpha Service Releases

v2.3.1

Date: 2024-07-15

  • FIX: Patched security vulnerability ALP-448
  • IMPROVEMENT: Reduced memory footprint
------------------------------------------------------------------------ 2. /home/user/release_pages/beta_release.html ------------------------------------------------------------------------ Beta Service Releases

Beta Service Releases

v1.8.0

Date: 2024-07-14

  • ADD: GraphQL endpoint for analytics
------------------------------------------------------------------------ 3. /home/user/release_pages/gamma_release.html ------------------------------------------------------------------------ Gamma Service Releases

Gamma Service Releases

v5.0.0

Date: 2024-07-10

  • MAJOR: Migrated to service mesh architecture
------------------------------------------------------------------------ Final artefacts that **must** exist after successful completion: A. /home/user/deploy/release_summary.yaml Expected exact content (including line-feeds; file ends with a single LF): services: - name: alpha latest_version: v2.3.1 release_date: "2024-07-15" - name: beta latest_version: v1.8.0 release_date: "2024-07-14" - name: gamma latest_version: v5.0.0 release_date: "2024-07-10" B. /home/user/deploy/extraction.log Expected exact content (file ends with a single LF): alpha:v2.3.1:2024-07-15 beta:v1.8.0:2024-07-14 gamma:v5.0.0:2024-07-10 File-system / permission expectations created by the agent: drwxr-xr-x /home/user/deploy -rw-r--r-- /home/user/deploy/release_summary.yaml -rw-r--r-- /home/user/deploy/extraction.log
